raw_text: francisco josé de la rosa martínez address: 12 3d, vereda de jaén, albacete, albacete, 02006, spain date of birth: 25"" april 1991 nationality: spanish id: 47096647-f email: franciscodelarosa91 2 gmail.com mobile: +34 690776076 personal profile my main objective is to learn as much as can and to improve my skills, such as my knowledge related to aerospace industry, but what would really like is to grow as a fair man who could feel satisfied with himself and other people could recognize him as a reliable person. consider myself as highly committed, responsible and punctual, qualities which look upon absolutely essential for any job. creating a good atmosphere between me and the people who have to deal with is quite necessary in order to obtain positive results. being optimistic, tolerant and cooperative are some of my qualities that can let me and the team belong to get better. my previous jobs made me an experienced person in teamwork, researching, taking decisions and using a wide range of software tools. education - 2009 2015 universitat politécnica de valéncia, valencia. full-time student of a five year degree in aerospace engineering. specialized in the field of propulsion. subjects included: aerodynamics, composite materials, aerostructures, aircraft engines and gas turbines and aircraft maintenance. final year research project called cfd study about lockheed martin sr-71's air inlet. lt is a cfd study about the performance and optimization of a supersonic mixed- compression air inlet. - 2003 2009 andrés de vandelvira high school, albacete. scientific/technological high school degree with an average final mark of 95/10. computer skills - advanced knowledge of the following software: - mathematica - matlab - ansys - ansys fluent (cfd) - catia v5 - solidworks - autodesk inventor - gasturb - gsp - microsoft office - tia portal - ramco aviation software languages - spanish mother tongue. - english advanced level, both in speaking and writing. professional experience - may. 2016 present mro engineer at babcock mcs spain s.a.u mro engineer in technical office department: - development of base and line maintenance work orders which are prepared in accordance with manufacturer's approved data. some of the aircraft models to which this task has been done are: b412, ab412, ka32a11bc, cn235, c212, p68 and b200. - engineering support to maintenance technicians while inspections are being performed. - development of technical reports and management of technical queries and repair requests sent to approved manufacturers and suppliers. - support to production planning. - management of service bulletins, airworthiness directives, etc. - validation of technical records and documentation generated. - jan. 2015-may. 2016 project assistant at inaer helicópteros s.a.u collaboration on avanti project. this project consisted on the implementation of anew erp, ramco aviation sotfware, which is using by all the babcocks operator companies. the support given to the engineering, purchasing, warehousing and maintenance departments for this project could be summarized in the following points: - analysis and migration of the available database (calm, logicclass, etc.). - data integration and data cleansing with etl tools. - population of the new database with the required information to ensure the aircrafts airworthiness and their corresponding maintenance. - definition, improvement and unification of the processes carried out in order to ensure the continuing airworthiness of the fleet. - jul - dec. 2014 intern researcher in turbomachinery and cogeneration project at emro s.l., albacete. collaboration on making drawings and blueprints of the turbomachinery using specific 3d design software. support on programming and maintaining the turbomachinery during its operation. additional information - clean driver's license. - certificate of achievement given by centro de formación permanente in a 50 hour course of catia v5 surfaces. - certificate of achievement given by cefoim in an 80 hour course of aeronautic assembler and sealer.
